docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, EFRAIN MIRANDA, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT MATTSON, TIMOTHY DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
